primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that reduces or eliminates gene function.
evidence: NID2 reduction by CRISPR interference (CRISPRi) in CAFs
we generated two NID2 knockdown CAF lines using two individual CRISPR interference (CRISPRi) guide RNA Krüppel-associated box (KRAB) constructs, B500 NID2 KRAB, and C500 NID2 KRAB.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: dissect the fibrotic signatures of pancreatic tumors from two commonly used genetically engineered mouse models (GEMMs) of pancreatic cancer: the highly metastatic KPC (Pdx1-Cre, LSL-KrasG12D/+, LSL-Trp53R172H/+) and poorly metastatic KPflC (Pdx1-Cre, LSL-KrasG12D/+, Trp53fl/+) mouse models.
we analyze decellularized tumors from age-matched KPC, KPflC, and wild-type (WT) control mice

attributes.agent: CRISPRi (B500 NID2 KRAB, C500 NID2 KRAB)
evidence: we generated two NID2 knockdown CAF lines using two individual CRISPR interference (CRISPRi) guide RNA Krüppel-associated box (KRAB) constructs, B500 NID2 KRAB, and C500 NID2 KRAB.
early-stage (41 to 53 days), mid-stage (70 to 84 days), and late-stage (99 to 212 days) time points

replicate_hints: DIA LC-MS/MS was performed on five independent biological replicates (apart from the mid-stage KPC tumor condition, which had four biological replicates)
three biological repeats per cell line performed

evidence: we focused on matrisomal proteins that were differentially abundant in the highly metastatic KPC model compared to the poorly metastatic KPflC model
Each sample was assigned a condition (CAF GFP-1 KRAB was assigned “control,” and CAF B500 NID2 KRAB and CAF C500 NID2 KRAB were assigned “NID2 knockdown”).
analyze decellularized tumors from age-matched KPC, KPflC, and wild-type (WT) control mice at three different stages during tumor development (early, mid, and late)

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The PRIDE metadata and methods explicitly state the use of 'data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode' and 'label-free' quantification (implied by the use of weighted peptide median values and log2 transformation/median subtraction in Perseus).

The main text describes a separate cohort of pancreatic tissue samples analyzed using 'label-free data-independent acquisition liquid chromatography–tandem MS (DIA LC-MS/MS)' and Spectronaut Pulsar X.

modifier_candidates.reason: The study uses ISDoT (in situ decellularization of tissues) and 0.5% SDC to specifically enrich for matrisomal proteins.
